# solidfire_volume (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "solidfire_volume" "my_vol" {
  volume_id = 456
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String)
- `volume_id` (Number)

### Read-Only

- `access` (String)
- `account_id` (Number)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `iqn` (String)
- `total_size` (Number)
